# Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham — Publication Guidelines

## 1. Corresponding Author Requirement
- The **Corresponding Author** must be an Amrita faculty member.
- Students and research staff (B.Tech, M.Tech, Ph.D. scholars, Post-Doctoral Fellows, Research Assistants) may be first or primary author, but **must not** be designated as corresponding author.

## 2. Affiliation and Email ID Requirement
- All Amrita-affiliated authors must use their **official Amrita email ID** in the manuscript submission system and publication.
- The department affiliation must include the term exactly as: **"Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham"**.
- Any variation, abbreviation, omission, or incorrect institutional name may result in the publication not being considered for institutional records, AIRA Awards, FAME calculations, ranking-related data collection, and other university evaluations.

## 3. Mandatory Acknowledgement for APC Reimbursement
For all publications where Article Processing Charges (APC) are claimed from the University, include the following acknowledgement statement:

> "The authors gratefully acknowledge Sri Mata Amritanandamayi Devi (Amma), Chancellor, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, for her inspiration and for providing financial support for the Article Processing Charges (APC) of this publication."

- APC reimbursement requests **will not be processed** if the above acknowledgement is not included in the published article.

## 4. APC Funding Compliance (from Endorsement Form)
- The article submitted for APC funding support must **strictly comply** with the Paper Publication Policy of Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham.
- The applicant must have **diligently investigated and applied for all available standard discounts/fee waiver options** extended by the Journal/Publisher before requesting APC reimbursement.

## Pre-Submission Checklist
- [ ] Corresponding author is an Amrita faculty member
- [ ] Official Amrita email IDs used for all Amrita-affiliated authors
- [ ] Affiliation reads exactly "Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham"
- [ ] APC acknowledgement included (if claiming APC)
- [ ] Read `Endorsement_Form_2026.docx` before submitting APC requests
- [ ] Explored publisher discounts/fee waivers before claiming APC
- [ ] Article complies with Amrita Paper Publication Policy
- [ ] Verify all requirements during proof correction stage
